title: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 86 Posts
org: Tamil Nadu Corporation for Development of Women (TNCDW) / Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission (TNSRLM), Sivaganga District Mission Management Unit (DMMU)
shortInfo: TNSRLM Sivaganga DMMU is recruiting 86 Community Bank Coordinators (temporary) with 12th standard qualification, last date 29 May 2026.

basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Sivaganga Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 86 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Corporation for Development of Women (TNCDW) / Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission (TNSRLM), Sivaganga District Mission Management Unit (DMMU)
basic_details.post_name: Community Bank Coordinator (Samudaya Vangi Orunginaipalar) – Temporary
basic_details.department: Block Mission Management Units (BMMUs) under TNSRLM, Sivaganga District
basic_details.short_information: TNSRLM Sivaganga DMMU is recruiting 86 Community Bank Coordinators (temporary) with 12th standard qualification, last date 29 May 2026.

important_dates.written test date: To be notified by District Selection Committee
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified after Written Test

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are not required to pay any fee at the time of application submission.

qualification.education_qualification: Must have passed 12th Standard (Class XII). Must be able to read, write and communicate well in both Tamil and English, and must have numerical/accounting skills. In hilly/tribal areas, if 12th pass candidates are not available, candidates with 10th Standard pass with other required qualifications may be considered with special permission from the District Collector.
qualification.experience: Must have worked as an SHG Promoter (Community Mobiliser) for a minimum of 2 years
qualification.domicile: Must belong to the Panchayat area (or Panchayats) served by the BMMU where the vacancy exists
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application (29/05/2026). This recruitment is exclusively for women SHG members who are active members of SHGs operating under the respective Panchayat-level federations.

selection_process: Selection will be conducted by the District Selection Committee through a Written Test followed by an Interview. Final selection is based on total weightage marks obtained in both stages. Applications received after the last date will not be accepted.
Eligible candidates will be called for the Written Test and Interview conducted by the District Selection Committee. Final selection will be based on the total weightage marks obtained.

Candidates who qualify in the Written Test will be called for a personal Interview by the District Selection Committee. The interview carries 25 marks and assesses the candidate's communication ability
and suitability for field-level coordination work.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply offline only. No online application mode is available. Applications must be submitted either in person or by Registered Post only. Applications sent by ordinary post or courier will not be accepted. Applications must be submitted on Government working days between 10:00 AM and 5:00 PM from 23.05.2026 to 29.05.2026.
Documents to be Enclosed with Application:
Application letter clearly mentioning: Name, Date of Birth, Age, Gender, Educational Qualification, Residential Address, Mobile Number (without any errors)
Age proof - Aadhaar Card / PAN Card / Driving Licence
Two-Wheeler Driving Licence (Two-wheeler - if available; gives preference in selection)

Submit Application In Person or By Registered Post To: Joint Director / Project Director Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission (TNSRLM) District Mission Management Unit (DMMU) Integrated Rural Development and Panchayat Building District Collectorate Campus Sivaganga District
important_instructions: This is a temporary post with a monthly honorarium of Rs. 2,500/- only. It is NOT a permanent or regular government job. No other service benefits are applicable. Selected coordinators must perform all five duties listed (bank linkage, loan recovery, financial literacy, insurance, digital financial services, individual loan facilitation) for SHGs in their assigned Panchayat-level federations. Candidates must own and operate an Android mobile phone and be capable of sending SMS and WhatsApp messages - this is a mandatory operational requirement for the role. Preference in selection will be given to candidates who have computer skills AND possess a valid two-wheeler driving licence and can ride a two-wheeler. Candidates must have communication skills and prior experience in completing banking transactions and loan applications for SHG members. Applications must be submitted only by in-person delivery or Registered Post - applications received late for any reason will not be accepted. The application box at the DMMU office is sealed - ensure you drop applications in person in the sealed box during office hours (10:00 AM to 5:00 PM) on Government working days. In hilly/tribal areas, where 12th pass women SHG candidates are not available, 10th pass candidates with all other qualifications may be considered only with the special permission of the District Collector. In Adi Dravidar (Scheduled Caste) residential areas in hilly regions, if the required female SHG member is not available, a male member may be selected with special permission from the District Collector. Candidates belonging to the identified target population (BPL/marginalised) as per census records are given priority. If no such candidates apply, other eligible applicants will be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application is 29 May 2026 up to 5:00 PM. Applications received after this deadline will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in TNSRLM Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 86 Community Bank Coordinator vacancies have been announced across various Block Mission Management Units (BMMUs) in Sivaganga District.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th Standard (Class XII) and should possess basic communication and numerical skills. In special cases (hilly areas), 10th pass candidates may be considered.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only women candidates who are active SHG members, with at least 2 years of SHG Promoter experience, and residing in the concerned Panchayat area are eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly honorarium of Rs. 2,500/-. This is a temporary position with no additional government benefits.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for TNSRLM CBC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test (75 marks) followed by an Interview (25 marks), totaling 100 marks.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for TNSRLM Sivaganga Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply offline by submitting their application in person or via Registered Post to the DMMU office in Sivaganga District.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for TNSRLM CBC application form 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must submit 12th certificate, age proof (Aadhaar/PAN/DL), address proof, application letter, and optionally a two-wheeler driving licence.

faq.question: Q10. Is TNSRLM Community Bank Coordinator a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a temporary position under TNSRLM with a fixed honorarium and no permanent government job benefits.
